old_value: {"id":"smallhold-abju","title":"Add Cache-Control headers for CDN support","description":"Set appropriate Cache-Control on all response types: immutable for media URLs, short TTL for public pages and discovery, no-store for API and auth endpoints.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T19:16:36.977208716Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T19:16:36.977208716Z"}
